description: After a shipment for a major retail partner has been dispatched, an EDI 856 (Advance Ship Notice) must be sent.

nodes.task_description: The system detects that a shipment has been marked as 'Shipped'.

expected_outcome.expected: A trigger is fired to initiate the ASN process.

nodes.task_description: The system gathers all required data for the ASN, including PO number, item details, quantities, and SSCC codes for each pallet.

expected_outcome.expected: All necessary data for the EDI document is compiled.

nodes.task_description: The system constructs and sends the EDI 856 document to the trading partner.

expected_outcome.expected: The ASN is successfully transmitted to the retail partner.
